revision.comment: Undid revision 1135263795 by [[Special:Contributions/TadejM|TadejM]] ([[User talk:TadejM|talk]]) Change to skin-specific wording was not an improvement.
doing this to force an update since the ambox redirect is messing with things
Bot: tag as missing wikidata (no wikidata found via interwikis)

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Text replacement - "{{Documentation}}" to "{{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]]"
Bot: wrap 8 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23575804085|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
{{ {{{|safesubst:}}}#invoke:Unsubst||date=__DATE__|$B= <!--{{Rough translation}} begin-->{{#ifeq:{{NAMESPACE}}|{{<includeonly>subst:</includeonly>NAMESPACE}}|<includeonly></includeonly>|}}{{Ambox | name = Rough translation | type = style | class = ambox-rough_translation | image = [[File:Translation to english arrow.svg|50x40px|Translation arrow icon]] | issue = This {{{3|article}}} '''may be a rough [[Wikipedia:translation|translation]] from {{#if:{{#invoke:ISO 639 name|iso_639_code_exists|{{{1|xyzzy}}}}}|{{ISO 639 name|{{{1}}}}}|{{{1|another language}}}}}'''. It may have been generated, in whole or in part, by a computer or by a translator without dual proficiency. | date = {{{date|}}} | fix = Please help to [{{fullurl:{{FULLPAGENAME}}|action=edit}} enhance the translation]. {{#if: {{{2|{{{1|}}}}}} | The original article is {{#if: {{{2|}}} | under "{{{2}}}" | {{#if: {{Mw lang|fn=is_name|{{{1}}}}} | under "{{#language:{{Mw lang|fn=code_from_name|{{{1}}}}}}}" | {{#if: {{Mw lang|fn=is_code|{{{1}}}}} | under "{{#language:{{{1}}}}}" | available }} }} }} in the ''"languages"'' list. }} {{#if:{{NAMESPACE}}||{{#ifeq: {{yesno|{{{listed|no}}}}}|yes|---- See '''[[Wikipedia:Pages needing translation into English#{{PAGENAME}}|this article's entry]]''' on [[Wikipedia:Pages needing translation into English|Pages needing translation into English]] for discussion.|{{pnt notice|{{{1|unknown}}}|cleanup}}}}}} | cat = Wikipedia articles needing cleanup after translation }}<includeonly>{{#if:{{{1|}}} |{{#ifexist:Category:Wikipedia articles needing cleanup after translation from {{{1}}}| |{{#ifexist:Category:Wikipedia articles needing cleanup after translation from {{ISO 639 name|{{{1}}}}}||}} }} |}}</includeonly><!--{{Rough translation}} end--> }}<noinclude>
{{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]] <!-- PLEASE ADD CATEGORIES AND INTERWIKIS TO THE /doc SUBPAGE, THANKS --></noinclude> <noinclude> [[Category:Pages with incorrectly substituted templates]] [[Category:Wikipedia articles needing cleanup after translation from {{{1}}}]] [[Category:Wikipedia articles needing cleanup after translation from {{ISO 639 name|{{{1}}}}}]] [[Category:Wikipedia articles needing cleanup after translation from {{{1}}}]] [[Category:Wikipedia articles needing cleanup after translation from unknown language]] [[Category:All Wikipedia articles needing cleanup after translation]] [[Category:sn_crud|TESTRough translation]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>

{{ {{{|safesubst:}}}#invoke:Unsubst||date=__DATE__|$B= <!--{{Rough translation}} begin-->{{#ifeq:{{NAMESPACE}}|{{<includeonly>subst:</includeonly>NAMESPACE}}|<includeonly></includeonly>|}}{{Ambox | name = Rough translation | type = style | class = ambox-rough_translation | image = [[File:Translation to english arrow.svg|50x40px|Translation arrow icon]] | issue = This {{{3|article}}} '''may be a rough [[Wikipedia:translation|translation]] from {{#if:{{#invoke:ISO 639 name|iso_639_code_exists|{{{1|xyzzy}}}}}|{{ISO 639 name|{{{1}}}}}|{{{1|another language}}}}}'''. It may have been generated, in whole or in part, by a computer or by a translator without dual proficiency. | date = {{{date|}}} | fix = Please help to [{{fullurl:{{FULLPAGENAME}}|action=edit}} enhance the translation]. {{#if: {{{2|{{{1|}}}}}} | The original article is {{#if: {{{2|}}} | under "{{{2}}}" | {{#if: {{Mw lang|fn=is_name|{{{1}}}}} | under "{{#language:{{Mw lang|fn=code_from_name|{{{1}}}}}}}" | {{#if: {{Mw lang|fn=is_code|{{{1}}}}} | under "{{#language:{{{1}}}}}" | available }} }} }} in the ''"languages"'' list. }} {{#if:{{NAMESPACE}}||{{#ifeq: {{yesno|{{{listed|no}}}}}|yes|---- See '''[[Wikipedia:Pages needing translation into English#{{PAGENAME}}|this article's entry]]''' on [[Wikipedia:Pages needing translation into English|Pages needing translation into English]] for discussion.|{{pnt notice|{{{1|unknown}}}|cleanup}}}}}} | cat = Wikipedia articles needing cleanup after translation }}<includeonly>{{#if:{{{1|}}} |{{#ifexist:Category:Wikipedia articles needing cleanup after translation from {{{1}}}| |{{#ifexist:Category:Wikipedia articles needing cleanup after translation from {{ISO 639 name|{{{1}}}}}||}} }} |}}</includeonly><!--{{Rough translation}} end--> }}<noinclude>
{{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]] <!-- PLEASE ADD CATEGORIES AND INTERWIKIS TO THE /doc SUBPAGE, THANKS --> [[Category:Pages with incorrectly substituted templates]] [[Category:Wikipedia articles needing cleanup after translation from {{{1}}}]] [[Category:Wikipedia articles needing cleanup after translation from {{ISO 639 name|{{{1}}}}}]] [[Category:Wikipedia articles needing cleanup after translation from {{{1}}}]] [[Category:Wikipedia articles needing cleanup after translation from unknown language]] [[Category:All Wikipedia articles needing cleanup after translation]] [[Category:sn_crud|TESTRough translation]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: remove [[Category:Sn crud]] (crud category cleanup) [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24296132115|time triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
{{ {{{|safesubst:}}}#invoke:Unsubst||date=__DATE__|$B= <!--{{Rough translation}} begin-->{{#ifeq:{{NAMESPACE}}|{{<includeonly>subst:</includeonly>NAMESPACE}}|<includeonly></includeonly>|}}{{Ambox | name = Rough translation | type = style | class = ambox-rough_translation | image = [[File:Translation to english arrow.svg|50x40px|Translation arrow icon]] | issue = This {{{3|article}}} '''may be a rough [[Wikipedia:translation|translation]] from {{#if:{{#invoke:ISO 639 name|iso_639_code_exists|{{{1|xyzzy}}}}}|{{ISO 639 name|{{{1}}}}}|{{{1|another language}}}}}'''. It may have been generated, in whole or in part, by a computer or by a translator without dual proficiency. | date = {{{date|}}} | fix = Please help to [{{fullurl:{{FULLPAGENAME}}|action=edit}} enhance the translation]. {{#if: {{{2|{{{1|}}}}}} | The original article is {{#if: {{{2|}}} | under "{{{2}}}" | {{#if: {{Mw lang|fn=is_name|{{{1}}}}} | under "{{#language:{{Mw lang|fn=code_from_name|{{{1}}}}}}}" | {{#if: {{Mw lang|fn=is_code|{{{1}}}}} | under "{{#language:{{{1}}}}}" | available }} }} }} in the ''"languages"'' list. }} {{#if:{{NAMESPACE}}||{{#ifeq: {{yesno|{{{listed|no}}}}}|yes|---- See '''[[Wikipedia:Pages needing translation into English#{{PAGENAME}}|this article's entry]]''' on [[Wikipedia:Pages needing translation into English|Pages needing translation into English]] for discussion.|{{pnt notice|{{{1|unknown}}}|cleanup}}}}}} | cat = Wikipedia articles needing cleanup after translation }}<includeonly>{{#if:{{{1|}}} |{{#ifexist:Category:Wikipedia articles needing cleanup after translation from {{{1}}}| |{{#ifexist:Category:Wikipedia articles needing cleanup after translation from {{ISO 639 name|{{{1}}}}}||}} }} |}}</includeonly><!--{{Rough translation}} end--> }}<noinclude>
{{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]] <!-- PLEASE ADD CATEGORIES AND INTERWIKIS TO THE /doc SUBPAGE, THANKS --> [[Category:Pages with incorrectly substituted templates]] [[Category:Wikipedia articles needing cleanup after translation from {{{1}}}]] [[Category:Wikipedia articles needing cleanup after translation from {{ISO 639 name|{{{1}}}}}]] [[Category:Wikipedia articles needing cleanup after translation from {{{1}}}]] [[Category:Wikipedia articles needing cleanup after translation from unknown language]] [[Category:All Wikipedia articles needing cleanup after translation]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: strip HTML comments [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24964547982|time triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
{{ {{{|safesubst:}}}#invoke:Unsubst||date=__DATE__|$B= {{#ifeq:{{NAMESPACE}}|{{<includeonly>subst:</includeonly>NAMESPACE}}|<includeonly></includeonly>|}}{{Ambox | name = Rough translation | type = style | class = ambox-rough_translation | image = [[File:Translation to english arrow.svg|50x40px|Translation arrow icon]] | issue = This {{{3|article}}} '''may be a rough [[Wikipedia:translation|translation]] from {{#if:{{#invoke:ISO 639 name|iso_639_code_exists|{{{1|xyzzy}}}}}|{{ISO 639 name|{{{1}}}}}|{{{1|another language}}}}}'''. It may have been generated, in whole or in part, by a computer or by a translator without dual proficiency. | date = {{{date|}}} | fix = Please help to [{{fullurl:{{FULLPAGENAME}}|action=edit}} enhance the translation]. {{#if: {{{2|{{{1|}}}}}} | The original article is {{#if: {{{2|}}} | under "{{{2}}}" | {{#if: {{Mw lang|fn=is_name|{{{1}}}}} | under "{{#language:{{Mw lang|fn=code_from_name|{{{1}}}}}}}" | {{#if: {{Mw lang|fn=is_code|{{{1}}}}} | under "{{#language:{{{1}}}}}" | available }} }} }} in the ''"languages"'' list. }} {{#if:{{NAMESPACE}}||{{#ifeq: {{yesno|{{{listed|no}}}}}|yes|---- See '''[[Wikipedia:Pages needing translation into English#{{PAGENAME}}|this article's entry]]''' on [[Wikipedia:Pages needing translation into English|Pages needing translation into English]] for discussion.|{{pnt notice|{{{1|unknown}}}|cleanup}}}}}} | cat = Wikipedia articles needing cleanup after translation }}<includeonly>{{#if:{{{1|}}} |{{#ifexist:Category:Wikipedia articles needing cleanup after translation from {{{1}}}| |{{#ifexist:Category:Wikipedia articles needing cleanup after translation from {{ISO 639 name|{{{1}}}}}||}} }} |}}</includeonly> }}<noinclude>
{{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]]
[[Category:Pages with incorrectly substituted templates]] [[Category:Wikipedia articles needing cleanup after translation from {{{1}}}]] [[Category:Wikipedia articles needing cleanup after translation from {{ISO 639 name|{{{1}}}}}]] [[Category:Wikipedia articles needing cleanup after translation from {{{1}}}]] [[Category:Wikipedia articles needing cleanup after translation from unknown language]] [[Category:All Wikipedia articles needing cleanup after translation]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>
